RECIPE: DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION À LA D'AGNELLI
 
serves: global enterprises | prep: 15 years | yield: $18m ebit
 
 
INGREDIENTS
 
technical — python, go, rust, ml pipelines, deep learning, llms & genai, rag systems, cloud (aws/azure/gcp)
 
management — programme management, stakeholder management, digital transformation, agile & waterfall, value consulting
 
 
 
METHOD
 
begin with a strong base of computer science (bsc, university of bari). fold in three years of software engineering at accenture milan. let rise through consulting roles across dublin and london. at deloitte, cultivate an anaplan practice from scratch — grow to 25+ practitioners. for the main course: combine all ingredients at c3 ai. direct a $15m programme, lead 70+ resources, deploy across 100+ plants. season with a gchq-certified msc in ethical hacking for depth. serve hot.
 
 
WINE PAIRING: a robust italian red — like the chef himself.
 
 [reservations] [github] [linkedin]
